title: schedonorus patulus
intro: Schedonorus patulus, also known as tickle grass or bent grass, is a species of perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. Schedonorus patulus is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in topical applications, such as salves and creams, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
